zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Grey於大約1371年出生在英國德比夏爾可德諾時，他的父親Henry de Grey41歲，母親Joan de Cobham22歲。他與Elizabeth Basset結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1418年8月1日在英國肯特艾勒斯福德享年48歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特艾勒斯福德艾勒斯福德 普利奧利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Grey于大约1371年出生在英国德比夏爾可德諾时，他的父亲Henry de Grey41岁，母亲Joan de Cobham22岁。他与Elizabeth Basset结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1418年8月1日在英国肯特艾勒斯福德享年48岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特艾勒斯福德艾勒斯福德 普利奧利。

nameMeanings.name: Grey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

variants.name: Gray
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: Greiwe
meanings: German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German greibe ‘sharp, tangy, dour’. Compare Grey .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Grey was born about 1371, in Codnor, Derbyshire, England, his father, Henry de Grey, was 41 and his mother, Joan de Cobham, was 22. He married Elizabeth Basset. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 1 August 1418, in Aylesford, Kent, England, at the age of 48, and was buried in Aylesford Priory, Aylesford, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Grey est né environ 1371, à Codnor, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Henry de Grey, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Joan de Cobham, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Basset. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 1 août 1418, à Aylesford, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à Aylesford Priory, Aylesford, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Grey(이)가 대략 1371년 영국 더비실르 코드너에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry de Grey(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Cobham(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Elizabeth Basset(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1418년 8월 1일 영국 켄트 아일레스퍼드에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 아일레스퍼드 아일레스퍼드 프리오리에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Grey родился около 1371 г. в местности коднор, дирбишир, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry de Grey было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Joan de Cobham, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Basset. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 1 августа 1418 г. в местности аилесфорд, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности аилесфорд приори, аилесфорд, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.
